[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A close-up illustration shows a person with dark, spiky hair leaning sideways, wearing a dark outfit and looking toward the viewer.

Main Subject: The main focus is a stylized face and upper head of a person with short-to-medium black hair, sharp bangs, and strands swept across the forehead; one eye is clearly visible with a dark outline, and a small facial marking appears near the cheek area.

Setting: The background is a plain light color with no discernible environment, suggesting a studio-like or minimal backdrop.

Visual Details: The person’s head is turned to the right of the image, with the hair covering parts of the face and casting bold, clean-looking black shapes over the forehead and eyes. The skin tones are rendered in light beige with soft shading, while the eyes appear dark with fine linework. Small details include a few small dot-like marks on the cheek and a small earring-like shape visible on the ear. The person wears a dark, ribbed or pleated garment with vertical folds along the neckline and upper shoulder area, drawn with layered line textures. The composition is a tight crop from the upper shoulder to the top of the head, angled slightly upward, with high-contrast line art and smooth, cel-shaded coloring.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image is a close-up, stylized portrait of a person with black hair and a dark outfit. It features minimal background space and crisp linework emphasizing the eyes, hair, and facial details.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Notes

The screenshot appears to be an illustration with no readable or visible UI/text elements.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
